name: arcproof-sdk
description: ArcProof SDK -- the published trust-layer packages (@arcproof/sdk, @arcproof/sdk-langchain, @arcproof/sdk-elizaos). Moved out of agent-ts/packages into its own top-level workspace once all three were proven and published, since none of them depend on agent-ts's private @arcproof/core/@arcproof/services packages.
